payload.answer: I can’t store “everything about AI” as a durable personal memory because it is too broad and not specific to your preferences, goals, projects, or personal context. Please choose a narrower memory to save.
repair_options: Save a specific AI-related preference, e.g. “I prefer explanations of AI concepts with practical examples.”
Save a specific project context, e.g. “I am working on a project about AI safety.”
Save a learning goal, e.g. “I want to learn about machine learning fundamentals.”
Save an interest area, e.g. “I am interested in generative AI tools for productivity.”
Do not save anything for now.
